title: malva × egarensis
intro: Malva × egarensis, also known as the hollyhock mallow, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of Malva and Althaea plants, typically found in temperate and tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Malva × egarensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling, promote wound healing, and protect against cell damage. Malva × egarensis can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for a range of health concerns.
